title: Escalation
description: A structured escalation record. Created when the feature runner or a worker encounters a condition that cannot be resolved autonomously.

source_role.description: Which role or system component created this escalation

source_session_id.description: Optional session ID of the worker that triggered the escalation

review_id.description: Optional review ID if the escalation originated from a review

reason_class.description: Classification of why escalation is needed

description.description: Human-readable description of what happened and why escalation is needed

context.description: Optional additional context — what the worker was doing when escalation was triggered

resolution.description: How the escalation was resolved (set when status changes to resolved)

dismissed_reason.description: Why the escalation was dismissed (set when status changes to dismissed)
